Package neqsim.process.equipment.distillation

Class DistillationColumn.TrayOptimizationResult

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.equipment.distillation.DistillationColumn.TrayOptimizationResult
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
Direct Known Subclasses:
DistillationColumn.EconomicTrayOptimizationResult
Enclosing class:
DistillationColumn
public static class DistillationColumn.TrayOptimizationResult extends Object implements Serializable
Result from a rigorous tray-count and feed-tray search.

The result is immutable and records the selected tray count, selected feed tray, product purity, duty estimates and convergence diagnostics from the final candidate run.

Version:
1.0
Author:
esol
See Also:

  • Constructor Details

    • TrayOptimizationResult

      public TrayOptimizationResult(boolean feasible, int numberOfTrays, int feedTrayNumber, String componentName, boolean topProduct, double targetPurity, double productPurity, double reboilerDuty, double condenserDuty, double totalAbsoluteDuty, int iterationCount, double temperatureResidual, double massResidual, double energyResidual, int evaluatedCases, int convergedCases, String message)
      Create a tray optimization result.
      Parameters:
      feasible - true if a candidate met the product specification
      numberOfTrays - total tray count including reboiler and condenser if present
      feedTrayNumber - 0-based feed tray number selected for all optimization feeds
      componentName - product component used in the purity specification
      topProduct - true when the purity target applies to the top product
      targetPurity - target product mole fraction
      productPurity - achieved product mole fraction
      reboilerDuty - reboiler duty in W
      condenserDuty - condenser duty in W
      totalAbsoluteDuty - sum of absolute condenser and reboiler duties in W
      iterationCount - solver iteration count for the final candidate
      temperatureResidual - final temperature residual in K
      massResidual - final relative mass residual
      energyResidual - final relative energy residual
      evaluatedCases - number of tray-count/feed-tray cases evaluated
      convergedCases - number of evaluated cases that converged
      message - diagnostic message describing the outcome

  • Method Details

    • isFeasible

      public boolean isFeasible()
      Check whether the optimization found a feasible candidate.
      Returns:
      true if the product specification was met by a converged candidate

    • getNumberOfTrays

      public int getNumberOfTrays()
      Get the selected total number of trays.
      Returns:
      total tray count including reboiler and condenser if present, or -1

    • getFeedTrayNumber

      public int getFeedTrayNumber()
      Get the selected feed tray number.
      Returns:
      0-based feed tray number, or -1 if no feasible candidate was found

    • getComponentName

      public String getComponentName()
      Get the component used for the product-purity specification.
      Returns:
      component name

    • isTopProduct

      public boolean isTopProduct()
      Check whether the optimized specification applies to the top product.
      Returns:
      true for top product, false for bottom product

    • getTargetPurity

      public double getTargetPurity()
      Get the target product mole fraction.
      Returns:
      target purity as mole fraction

    • getProductPurity

      public double getProductPurity()
      Get the achieved product mole fraction.
      Returns:
      achieved product purity as mole fraction, or Double.NaN

    • getReboilerDuty

      public double getReboilerDuty()
      Get the final reboiler duty.
      Returns:
      reboiler duty in W, or 0.0 when no reboiler is present

    • getCondenserDuty

      public double getCondenserDuty()
      Get the final condenser duty.
      Returns:
      condenser duty in W, or 0.0 when no condenser is present

    • getTotalAbsoluteDuty

      public double getTotalAbsoluteDuty()
      Get the objective duty used to compare candidates with the same tray count.
      Returns:
      sum of absolute condenser and reboiler duties in W

    • getIterationCount

      public int getIterationCount()
      Get the final solver iteration count.
      Returns:
      iteration count for the final candidate

    • getTemperatureResidual

      public double getTemperatureResidual()
      Get the final temperature residual.
      Returns:
      temperature residual in K

    • getMassResidual

      public double getMassResidual()
      Get the final mass residual.
      Returns:
      relative mass residual

    • getEnergyResidual

      public double getEnergyResidual()
      Get the final energy residual.
      Returns:
      relative energy residual

    • getEvaluatedCases

      public int getEvaluatedCases()
      Get the number of evaluated candidate cases.
      Returns:
      evaluated tray-count/feed-tray combinations

    • getConvergedCases

      public int getConvergedCases()
      Get the number of converged candidate cases.
      Returns:
      converged tray-count/feed-tray combinations

    • getMessage

      public String getMessage()
      Get the optimization diagnostic message.
      Returns:
      diagnostic message
